arts.ttl: Good news and bad news for Bayern Munich’s walking wounded
arts.sum: While Coman, Gnabry, Neuer and Stanišić are back with the team, João Palhinha is still training individually and is expected to join team training at the end of the coming week or the beginning of the following week. Bayern Munich stars Kingsley Coman, Serge Gnabry, Manuel Neuer and Josip Stanišić have all rejoined team training.

arts.ttl: RB Salzburg vs Bayern Munich: Live stream, game time thread, odds, prediction, how to watch
arts.sum: Bayern Munich will take a quick trip to Austria for a friendly with RB Salzburg. Bayern will use the game as a tune-up for the Gladbach match this upcoming weekend.

arts.ttl: Nathaniel Brown, Michael Olise and Lasse Rosenboom nominated for December Rookie of the month
arts.sum: Eintracht Frankfurt's Nathaniel Brown, Michael Olise of Bayern Munich and Holstein Kiel's Lasse Rosenboom are up for nomination from December 2024 – vote for your favourite now! The Bundesliga honours the best young talents in the league with the Rookie of the Month Award, in association with Sorare.

arts.ttl: Bayern Munich Alumni: Javi Martínez recalls Jamal Musiala’s early days in the senior squad
arts.sum: With how much he has accomplished in such a short period of time, it already feels like ages ago that Jamal Musiala made his breakthrough into the Bayern Munich senior squad along with the German national team. In that season, Musiala made a total of 39 appearances across all competitions, tallying seven goals and one assist.

arts.ttl: Bayern not considering move for Olmo, Bild reports
arts.sum: Bild reports that Bayern Munich are not considering a move for Dani Olmo, despite the former RB Leipzig star reportedly having a special clause allowing him to leave Barcelona on a free transfer this month.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Atletico Madrid and Bayern Munich both keen to sign £52m player from Chelsea this month
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively reveal that Chelsea will not stand in Christopher Nkunku’s way if he decides to leave this month with interest emerging from...

arts.ttl: Michael Olise shares his great interest in chess, admits to losing streak against Kingsley Coman
arts.sum: Still, it does make moments where fans get to know a player outside of football really special. Aiming to do exactly this, Bayern Munich ’s Michael Olise held an interview for fans to get to know him a little better.

arts.ttl: Herbert Hainer believes Bayern Munich “drew the right conclusions” from the disastrous 2021 AGM
arts.sum: Three years on, however, Qatar Airways is no longer a sponsor of the club, Hainer is still president of Bayern and he has claimed to have learned the right lessons from the whole debacle: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany.

arts.ttl: Bavarian Podcast Works S7E24: Expectations for Bayern Munich’s second half; Will the bevy of contract situations be a distraction?; Should Bayern wait until 2026 for Florian Wirtz?; and MORE!
arts.sum: Be sure to stay tuned to Bavarian Podcast Works for all of your up to date coverage on Bayern Munich and Germany. Bayern Munich is back in action this week, but what should fans expect from the group by the end of the season?

arts.ttl: Borussia Mönchengladbach's 5 best wins over Bayern Munich
arts.sum: With Borussia Dortmund also taking six points from Bayern that year, they remain the last two teams to beat the record champions home and away in a single season. It looked as if Bayern would cruise to another victory over BMG when August Starek opened the scoring after just 11 minutes, but Gladbach rallied to claim their first ever win over the Bavarians.
